body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Keep ADB-weak TVs out of the driven sweep**

When Step 4 marks a TV as `tvAdbWeak`, `Step5Intro` routes directly to `step5_fallback`, but this classifier still treats every `adb` backend with a TV IP as sweepable because `planSwitch` can build the same `KEYCODE_TV_INPUT_HDMI_N` command. In that ADB-weak case the fallback now offers/runs the exact discrete-input path that already failed, while the previous CEC/blind-cycle alternatives were removed, so users with ADB-weak TVs no longer get a usable fallback path.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
